question: Can we determine from the map whether the average unemployment rate in Mexico (B) was higher than in France (C) over 10 years?

options.A: Yes, Mexico (B) had a higher average unemployment rate
options.B: Yes, France (C) had a higher average unemployment rate
options.C: They had exactly the same average unemployment rate

explanation: Mexico and France both have measured data, so we can compare them numerically. Mexico is 12.8% vs 3.3% for France.
